projects.title: Last Sentinel
projects.description: Senior Gameplay Engineer on a narrative open-world action game set in futuristic Tokyo.

subprojects.title: Mission System
subprojects.description: Built and owned a Mission system that drives mission flow and manages UE5 World Partition data layers, controlling which open-world content loads and unloads based on mission state. Built designer tools for fast-forward, rewind, and in-editor objective debugging. Extended save/load to support mission checkpoints, open-world auto-saves, and mid-mission snapshots.

subprojects.title: IGC Framework
subprojects.description: Built an In-Game Cinematic framework for scripting multi-character animated scenes with support for props, moving platforms, and QTEs. Integrated UE5's Level Sequencer with multiple actor binding strategies.

subprojects.title: World and UI Systems
subprojects.description: Built a marker and compass system for open-world navigation and mission flow. Developed a UI framework using an MVVM pattern integrated with UE5's ViewModel architecture. Led scripting workshops and mentored designers and co-development engineers.

projects.title: Hearthstone
projects.description: Software Engineer on the Hearthstone team across five major expansions, focused on solo adventure experiences and the systems powering the in-game Journal: quests, achievements, missions, and reward progression.

subprojects.title: Framework and Scripting
subprojects.description: Implemented a Lua scripting framework on the game server enabling data-driven mission and quest scripting. Refactored the hero picker to be fully data-driven. Contributed to UI framework improvements in Unity/C#.

subprojects.title: Solo Adventures
subprojects.description: Implemented the design for The Dalaran Heist (Rise of Shadows) and Tombs of Terror (Saviors of Uldum), building mission flow, encounter management, and the systems powering branching adventure progression.

subprojects.title: Journal, Quests and Achievements
subprojects.description: Built and extended systems within the Hearthstone Journal: daily and weekly quest tracking, achievement pipelines, reward progression, and the scripted mission system used to define player objectives for each expansion cycle.

projects.title: StarBlood Arena
projects.description: Gameplay Programmer on a 360-degree PS4/PSVR arena shooter.

subprojects.title: AI and Navigation
subprojects.description: Improved custom AI navigation mesh generation and added tunable difficulty levels. Improved AI combat targeting and basic behavior.

subprojects.title: Game Modes and Matchmaking
subprojects.description: Implemented single-player and cooperative game modes including a wave defense mode optimized with an object pool manager. Built the framework for sending match configurations to the matchmaking service and refactored the team system to support it.

projects.title: Ghostbusters
projects.description: Software Engineer at FireForge on the official Ghostbusters tie-in for the 2016 film.

subprojects.title: AI and Ability System
subprojects.description: Developed gameplay ability systems and improved AI movement with a box volume constraint system. Exposed features to Blueprint scripting for designer access.

subprojects.title: Audio Localization
subprojects.description: Modified the engine's audio system to route dialog based on culture and locale settings.

projects.title: Vessels of Rath
projects.description: Action RPG developed internally at WhiteMoon Dreams to showcase the studio's Orbital platform, a cloud backend for hosting and serving live game content.

projects.title: Crazy 88s
projects.description: Personal project made with a group of friends. A card game framework in Unity to implement favorite card games and play them digitally online via phone or PC.

projects.title: RTS Prototype
projects.description: Online multiplayer RTS prototype built with a team of 3 engineers. Worked on AI, formations, ability/attribute system, targeting system, and various other systems. Used in multiple sales pitches.

projects.title: Shadowrun Crossfire Digital Prototype
projects.description: Proof of concept prototype demonstrating an online version of the Shadowrun Crossfire tabletop game. Developed in under a week, helping win an RFP. Worked on the Socket.IO implementation and UI integration.

projects.title: Furball Frenzy
projects.description: Personal project made in Unity to help a friend with her senior art thesis. Built with a small group of friends in two weeks. A simple cat matching game in the vein of Bejeweled with a few twists. I handled gameplay and sprite animation.
